text: Jab usne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, tabse mere sar mein aisa dard hai ki aankhein kholna mushkil ho raha hai. Maine toh bas apni safety aur studies ke liye stand liya tha, par ab lagta hai jaise chest mein koi bhari pathar rakh diya ho. Samajh nahi aa raha ye sharir itna kyun toot raha hai, bas thakan aisi hai ki din bhar soye rehne ka mann karta hai.

Partner ne jab taana mara ki main 'badal' gayi hoon, tabse meri raaton ki neend ud gayi hai aur gale mein hamesha kuch atka sa mehsus hota hai. Ghar ka marriage pressure aur restricted mobility toh pehle hi thi, ab ye naya darr pet mein ajeeb si jalan paida kar raha hai. Main usey ro kar nahi bata sakti kyunki 'mard nahi rota' sunte-sunte hum ladkiyon ko bhi rone se sharam aane lagi hai, bas sharir bol raha hai.

Uski baatein sunkar mera dum ghutne laga aur tabse mere kandhon mein itni jakdan hai jaise bohot bojh utha rakha ho. Main college ki padhai aur ghar ki 'izzat' dono sambhal rahi hoon, par sharir hai ki saath hi nahi de raha. Har waqt aisa lagta hai ki bukhar chadha hua hai, par dimaag mein kya chal raha hai wo kisi ko kaise samjhaun?

Jabse usne badalne ki baat ki hai, meri hatheliyon mein paseena aata rehta hai aur dil ki dhadkan achanak badh jaati hai. Mujhe lagta hai shehar ki pollution ki wajah se mujhe saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai, ya shayad thakan bohot zyada hai. Main rona nahi chahti kyunki log kahenge ki kamzor hoon, par ye chest tightness mera peecha nahi chhod rahi.

Uski baat sunne ke baad se mere poore sharir mein ajeeb si kampann hone lagi hai aur khana hazam hi nahi ho raha. Main bas ek achi beti aur partner banna chahti hoon par ye sir dard itna 'shiddat' ka hai ki padhai pe dhyan hi nahi lagta. Shayad ye mausam badalne ki wajah se hai, par har waqt aisa lagta hai jaise koi mera gala daba raha ho.
